nasb.text: He made Him who knew no sin to be sin on our behalf, so that we might become the righteousness of God in Him.

esv.text: For our sake he made him to be sin who knew no sin, so that in him we might become the righteousness of God.

cnv.text: 神使那無罪的替我們成為有罪的，使我們在他裡面成為　神的義。

ccb.text: 上帝使无罪的基督担当我们的罪，使我们可以借着基督成为被上帝接纳的义人。

csbs.text: 神使那位没有罪的替我们成为罪，好使我们在他里面成为神的义。
